homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Dedication to Mesa Garage Doors
aboutText: Discount Garage Door Repair of Mesa Arizona started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable garage door service to our neighbors. We're a family-owned business, born and raised right here in the Valley.

We believe in doing the job right the first time. Our technicians are trained to handle any garage door issue, from broken springs to malfunctioning openers. We use only quality parts and stand behind our work.
We're proud to be part of the Mesa community. We support local schools and charities, and we're committed to providing affordable garage door solutions to our fellow residents.

services.name: Garage Door Spring Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert repair and replacement of broken or worn garage door springs.
services.description:
Garage door springs are under immense tension and can be dangerous to handle without the proper tools and expertise. At Discount Garage Door Repair of Mesa Arizona, we specialize in safely and efficiently repairing or replacing broken garage door springs. Whether you have torsion springs or extension springs, our technicians are trained to handle the job with precision. We only use high-quality springs designed to withstand the harsh Arizona climate, ensuring long-lasting performance. 

Our spring repair service includes a thorough inspection of your entire garage door system to identify any potential problems. We'll lubricate moving parts, check cables and rollers, and make sure your door is balanced correctly. A properly functioning garage door spring system is essential for the safe and reliable operation of your door. Don't risk injury or further damage by attempting to repair springs yourself. 

 We offer same-day spring repair service in Mesa and surrounding areas. Call us today for a free estimate.
process: Inspect the spring system and assess the damage.
Safely release tension from the broken spring.
Remove the old spring and install a new, high-quality replacement.
Balance the door and test its operation.
Lubricate moving parts and ensure smooth operation.
benefits: Improved safety and reliability of your garage door.
Extended lifespan of your garage door system.
Smooth and quiet operation.
Prevention of further damage to your door and opener.

faq.question: How long do garage door springs typically last?
faq.answer: Garage door springs typically last between 7 and 12 years, depending on usage and environmental factors. Extreme heat and frequent use can shorten their lifespan.

faq.question: What are the signs of a broken garage door spring?
faq.answer: Signs of a broken spring include a loud bang, a garage door that is difficult to open or close, or a door that is hanging unevenly.

faq.question: Can I replace garage door springs myself?
faq.answer: It is not recommended to replace garage door springs yourself due to the high tension involved, which can cause serious injury. Always hire a trained professional.

services.name: Garage Door Opener Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable repair and replacement of garage door openers of all makes and models.
services.description:
Is your garage door opener making strange noises, failing to open or close properly, or simply not working at all? Discount Garage Door Repair of Mesa Arizona provides expert garage door opener repair services. We service all major brands, including LiftMaster, Chamberlain, Genie, and more. Our technicians are skilled in diagnosing and repairing a wide range of opener problems, from faulty sensors to broken gears. 

 We understand the inconvenience of a malfunctioning garage door opener, especially during the scorching Mesa summers. That's why we offer fast, reliable service to get your opener back in working order quickly. If your opener is beyond repair, we can recommend and install a new, energy-efficient model that meets your needs. We'll also ensure that your new opener is properly programmed and integrated with your existing garage door system. 

 Protect your home and family with a properly functioning garage door opener. Call us today for a free estimate.
process: Diagnose the cause of the opener malfunction.
Repair or replace faulty components, such as sensors, gears, or circuit boards.
Program the opener and test its operation.
Adjust the opener's safety features to ensure proper functionality.
Provide maintenance tips to extend the life of your opener.
benefits: Convenient and reliable operation of your garage door.
Improved safety and security of your home.
Extended lifespan of your garage door opener.
Reduced risk of accidents and injuries.

faq.question: How do I know if my garage door opener needs to be repaired or replaced?
faq.answer: If your opener is making loud noises, struggling to lift the door, or malfunctioning frequently, it may be time for a repair or replacement. We can provide an honest assessment and recommend the best option.

faq.question: What are the different types of garage door openers?
faq.answer: The main types of garage door openers are chain drive, belt drive, and screw drive. Belt drive openers are the quietest, while chain drive openers are the most affordable.

faq.question: How often should I have my garage door opener serviced?
faq.answer: It's recommended to have your garage door opener serviced annually to ensure proper operation and prevent potential problems.

services.name: Garage Door Cable Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert repair and replacement of damaged or frayed garage door cables.
services.description:
Garage door cables play a crucial role in the safe and efficient operation of your garage door. These cables work in conjunction with the springs to lift and lower the door. If a cable breaks or becomes frayed, it can cause the door to become unbalanced and potentially dangerous. Discount Garage Door Repair of Mesa Arizona offers professional garage door cable repair and replacement services. 

 Our technicians are trained to safely handle damaged or broken cables. We use only high-quality cables that are designed to withstand the weight and stress of your garage door. We'll also inspect your entire garage door system to identify any potential problems and ensure that your door is operating smoothly and safely. 

 Don't wait until a broken cable causes a major problem. Call us today for prompt and reliable cable repair service. We serve Mesa and the surrounding areas.
process: Inspect the cables for damage or fraying.
Safely release tension from the cables.
Remove the old cables and install new, high-quality replacements.
Balance the door and test its operation.
Ensure proper cable tension and alignment.
benefits: Improved safety and reliability of your garage door.
Prevention of further damage to your door and opener.
Smooth and quiet operation.
Extended lifespan of your garage door system.

faq.question: What causes garage door cables to break?
faq.answer: Garage door cables can break due to wear and tear, corrosion, or improper maintenance. Lack of lubrication can also contribute to cable failure.

faq.question: Can I replace garage door cables myself?
faq.answer: It is not recommended to replace garage door cables yourself due to the high tension involved, which can cause serious injury. Always hire a trained professional.

faq.question: How often should I inspect my garage door cables?
faq.answer: You should inspect your garage door cables at least twice a year for signs of damage or fraying.

services.name: Garage Door Roller Replacement
services.shortDescription: Smooth and quiet garage door operation with our professional roller replacement service.
services.description:
Worn or damaged garage door rollers can cause your door to operate noisily and inefficiently. They can also put unnecessary strain on your garage door opener. Discount Garage Door Repair of Mesa Arizona offers professional garage door roller replacement services using high-quality rollers that are designed to provide smooth and quiet operation. 

 We offer a variety of roller options, including nylon rollers and steel rollers, to suit your specific needs and budget. Our technicians will carefully remove the old rollers and install new ones, ensuring proper alignment and lubrication. We'll also inspect your tracks for any damage and make any necessary repairs. 

 Upgrade your garage door's performance with our roller replacement service. Call us today for a free estimate.
process: Inspect the rollers and tracks for damage or wear.
Remove the old rollers and install new, high-quality replacements.
Lubricate the rollers and tracks.
Test the door's operation to ensure smooth and quiet movement.
Adjust the tracks as needed.
benefits: Quieter garage door operation.
Smoother door movement.
Reduced strain on your garage door opener.
Extended lifespan of your garage door system.

faq.question: What are the different types of garage door rollers?
faq.answer: The main types of garage door rollers are nylon rollers and steel rollers. Nylon rollers are quieter, while steel rollers are more durable.

faq.question: How often should I replace my garage door rollers?
faq.answer: You should replace your garage door rollers every 5-7 years, or sooner if they show signs of wear or damage.

faq.question: Can I replace garage door rollers myself?
faq.answer: Replacing garage door rollers can be dangerous if not done properly. It is recommended to hire a professional.

services.name: Garage Door Panel Replacement
services.shortDescription: Restore your garage door's appearance and functionality with our panel replacement service.
services.description:
Damaged garage door panels can detract from your home's curb appeal and compromise the security of your garage. Discount Garage Door Repair of Mesa Arizona offers professional garage door panel replacement services. We can replace individual panels that are dented, cracked, or otherwise damaged. 

 We offer a wide variety of panel styles and colors to match your existing garage door. Our technicians will carefully remove the damaged panel and install a new one, ensuring a seamless fit. We'll also inspect your entire garage door system to identify any potential problems. 

 Don't let a damaged garage door panel ruin your home's appearance. Call us today for a free estimate.
process: Assess the damage to the garage door panels.
Match the existing panel style and color.
Remove the damaged panel and install a new replacement.
Ensure proper alignment and secure attachment.
Test the door's operation.
benefits: Improved curb appeal of your home.
Restored security of your garage.
Extended lifespan of your garage door.
Prevention of further damage to your door.

faq.question: Can I replace just one panel on my garage door?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, you can replace just one panel on your garage door if it is damaged.

faq.question: How do I match the color of my existing garage door panels?
faq.answer: We can help you match the color of your existing garage door panels using paint samples or manufacturer specifications.

faq.question: How long does it take to replace a garage door panel?
faq.answer: Replacing a garage door panel typically takes 1-2 hours.

services.name: New Garage Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with a new, high-quality garage door from Discount Garage Door Repair.
services.description:
Looking to upgrade your home with a new garage door? Discount Garage Door Repair of Mesa Arizona offers professional garage door installation services. We carry a wide selection of garage doors from leading manufacturers, including steel doors, wood doors, and insulated doors. We'll help you choose the perfect door to match your home's style and budget. 

 Our experienced technicians will handle every aspect of the installation process, from removing your old door to installing your new one. We'll also ensure that your new door is properly balanced and that all safety features are functioning correctly. 

 Increase your home's value and curb appeal with a new garage door from Discount Garage Door Repair. Call us today for a free consultation.
process: Remove the old garage door and dispose of it properly.
Install the new garage door and opener.
Connect the opener to the power supply.
Program the opener and test its operation.
Adjust the door's safety features to ensure proper functionality.
benefits: Increased home value.
Improved curb appeal.
Enhanced security.
Energy efficiency.
Reliable operation.

faq.question: How much does a new garage door cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a new garage door depends on the material, style, and features. We offer a variety of options to fit your budget.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a new garage door?
faq.answer: Installing a new garage door typically takes 4-6 hours.

faq.question: What are the benefits of an insulated garage door?
faq.answer: Insulated garage doors can help reduce energy costs and make your garage more comfortable year-round.

services.name: Emergency Garage Door Repair
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency garage door repair services in Mesa and surrounding areas.
services.description:
A broken garage door can be a major inconvenience and a security risk, especially during the extreme heat of the Arizona summer. Discount Garage Door Repair of Mesa Arizona offers 24/7 emergency garage door repair services to address urgent issues. Whether it's a broken spring, a malfunctioning opener, or a door that's stuck open, we're here to help. 

 Our technicians are available day and night to provide fast, reliable service. We'll arrive quickly, diagnose the problem, and provide a solution to get your garage door back in working order as soon as possible. We understand the importance of securing your home and family, so we prioritize emergency repair calls. 

 Don't wait until morning to address a garage door emergency. Call us anytime for prompt and professional service.
process: Respond quickly to your emergency call.
Diagnose the problem and provide a solution.
Repair or replace damaged components.
Ensure the door is operating safely and securely.
Provide temporary solutions if a permanent fix is not immediately possible.
benefits: Fast and reliable service.
Peace of mind knowing your home is secure.
Prevention of further damage to your garage door.
Convenient 24/7 availability.

faq.question: What is considered a garage door emergency?
faq.answer: A garage door emergency is any situation that poses a safety risk or prevents you from securing your garage, such as a broken spring, a malfunctioning opener, or a door that's stuck open.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency call?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to emergency calls as quickly as possible, typically within 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Do you charge extra for emergency service?
faq.answer: Yes, we do charge a premium for emergency service to cover the cost of after-hours availability.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Our garage door spring snapped on a Saturday morning. I called Discount Garage Door Repair and they were at my house within an hour! The technician, Mike, was professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: My garage door opener was making a horrible grinding noise. The technician from Discount Garage Door Repair diagnosed the problem as a worn-out gear. He replaced it quickly and now it's running smoothly. Good service!

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We recently had Discount Garage Door Repair install a new garage door. The whole process was seamless, from the initial consultation to the final installation. The installers were professional and courteous, and the new door looks great!

reviews.name: David M.
reviews.text: The cable on my garage door snapped unexpectedly. I called Discount Garage Door Repair and they were able to come out the same day. The technician was very knowledgeable and fixed the problem quickly. Great service!

reviews.name: Ashley K.
reviews.text: My garage door was making a lot of noise. Discount Garage Door Repair replaced the rollers, and now it's much quieter. The technician was friendly and efficient.

reviews.name: Brian T.
reviews.text: I had a garage door emergency late at night. Discount Garage Door Repair answered the phone and had a technician at my house within an hour. He fixed the problem quickly and secured my garage. Excellent service!
